data.title: Upstream Bio to Present New Data from Phase 2 VIBRANT Trial of Verekitug at the ATS 2026 International Conference
data.description: WALTHAM, Mass., April 17, 2026 - Upstream Bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: UPB), a clinical-stage company focusing on treatments for inflammatory diseases, particularly severe respiratory disorders, revealed plans to present two posters at the American Thoracic Society (ATS) 2026 International Conference in Orlando, FL, on May 18, 2026. The presentations will unveil fresh insights from the Phase 2 VIBRANT trial assessing verekitug, the sole antagonist to the thymic stromal lymphopoietin (TSLP) receptor currently progressing through clinical phases, in chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps (CRSwNP). The data will showcase the clinical impact of verekitug on participants with CRSwNP and coexisting asthma, alongside its effects on nasal and blood biomarkers.
Kustom Entertainment and Cycurion agree on terms for sale of legacy video solutions segment. Deal worth $5 million.

data.title: AOI Expands Its Houston-Area Footprint to 900,000 Square Feet to Increase Capacity and Support Future Growth
data.description: AOI, a tech company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AAOI, recently revealed plans for a substantial growth of its manufacturing operations in the Houston region. The expansion will involve the addition of 388,000 square feet of space in Pearland, Texas.
BioXcel Therapeutics plans virtual event to discuss commercial launch plan for IGALMI® in home setting, based on market opportunity assessment.

data.title: Golf Inc. Magazine Ranks Concert Golf Partners' Purchase of The Club at New Seabury as No. 1 Deal of Year
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 16, 2026, Concert Golf Partners finalized the acquisition of The Club at New Seabury located on Cape Cod. This transaction has been recognized as the top deal for the "Top Sales of 2025" by Golf Inc. magazine in their March/April 2026 publication. The prestigious New Seabury property was bought from IE Homes, Clubs & with impressive recognition for its value and impact on the industry.

data.title: Paris Panel cautions tokenization won't instantly boost liquidity for RWAs; execs debuunk assumption of tradeable markets.
data.description: At the Paris Blockchain Week, industry leaders discussed the misconception that digitizing real estate and private credit assets will instantly generate tradable markets. This viewpoint was emphasized by executives, who highlighted the need for careful consideration and strategy implementation in this evolving sector. The event gathered notable figures and professionals from the industry to delve into current trends and challenges. The discussion underscores the importance of understanding the complexities involved in utilizing blockchain technology for asset tokenization. As the sector continues to grow, it is imperative for stakeholders to navigate these nuances effectively to capitalize on the opportunities presented.

data.title: RTX's Pratt & Whitney Canada launches PT6C-67C and PW127XT MRO services in Singapore
data.description: In Singapore on April 17, 2026, Pratt & Whitney Canada introduced improved maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services for helicopter and regional turboprop engines in the Asia Pacific region. This initiative aims to better support operators in the area, offering enhanced services for their aircraft engines. The new offerings are designed to cater specifically to the needs of helicopter and regional turboprop operators in the region, providing them with specialized support.

data.title: U.S. Patent Trial and Appeal Board Invalidates Trina's TOPCon Patents
data.description: Canadian Solar Inc., based in Kitchener, ON, disclosed on April 17, 2026, that the Patent Trial and Appeal Board (PTAB) of the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) has released Final Written Decisions nullifying all claims. The company, listed on NASDAQ as CSIQ, revealed this recent development.

data.title: /R E P E A T --Metro Supply Chain to join NX Group to accelerate global growth while maintaining its strong Canadian roots/
data.description: Today, on April 17, 2026, Metro Supply Chain Inc. revealed that its majority shareholder, LDC Metro Holdings Inc. ("LDC"), along with La Caisse, has signed a deal to sell Metro Supply Chain to Nippon Express Holdings Inc. ("NX Group"), a global entity.

data.title: AdvanSix to Release First Quarter Financial Results and Hold Investor Conference Call on May 8
data.description: AdvanSix, based in Parsippany, New Jersey, is set to announce its first quarter financial results on May 8. The company will also host an investor conference call on the same day. This update aims to provide stakeholders with insights into AdvanSix's performance during the initial part of the year. Stay tuned for more information on the numbers and discussions during the upcoming event.

data.title: BJ’s Wholesale Club Marks Texas Debut with Grand Opening of Forney Location
data.description: BJ’s Wholesale Club (NYSE: BJ) has unveiled its entry into the Texas market by announcing the opening of their Forney club on April 24. Commencing operations, the club's gas station began services on April 17. In honor of this significant moment, BJ’s Gas facility, located at 11150 E US Highway 80 in Forney, will be providing gas to members for just $2 per gallon for a limited time on Wednesday, April 22, from 6:30 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. This special price offer applies to regular gas purchases and is limited to a maximum of 30 gallons per customer.

data.title: CrossAmerica Partners will reveal Q1 2026 earnings on May 6.
data.description: A recent report states that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.4% in 2022, following a 5.9% expansion in 2021. The United States is expected to see a growth rate of 4% this year, while China is projected to grow by 5.7%. Inflation is forecasted to reach 3.2% globally, with advanced economies experiencing a 3.7% increase and emerging market and developing economies expected to see a 3.1% rise. Additionally, global trade volume is predicted to increase by 7.2% in 2022.

data.title: Global Precast Concrete Market to Reach USD 261.5 Billion by 2035, Led by Asia Pacific Growth and Giants Like LafargeHolcim & CRH Plc
data.description: In the latest report by Future Market Insights, it has been disclosed that the global precast concrete market is set for significant growth. This growth is mainly attributed to the construction sector's growing utilization of modular construction methods, eco-friendly materials, and swift building processes. The data from the analysis indicates that the market is projected to witness robust expansion in the coming years.

TRUMP SIGNALS FLEXIBILITY IN IRAN TALKS Reports citing a senior Gulf official say U.S. President Donald Trump may offer new concessions in negotiations with Iran. The official added that Trump is serious about the talks and aims to resolve the issue.

data.title: Cleveland-Cliffs Likely To Report Narrower Q1 Loss; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Cleveland-Cliffs Inc. (NYSE: CLF) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 20. Analysts are anticipating a loss of 41 cents per share for the Cleveland-based company, an improvement from the 92 cents per share loss in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for quarterly revenue stands at $4.79 billion, higher than the $4.63 billion reported in the previous year. In the fourth quarter, Cleveland-Cliffs delivered mixed financial results. The company's shares closed at $9.72 on Thursday, marking a 0.6% increase. For more detailed analyst ratings and insights, readers can visit the Benzinga website.

data.title: Summer Road Calls on the Board of Ingles Markets to Stop Wasting Shareholder Resources on Fabricated Issues to Mislead Shareholders
data.description: A statement was released by Summer Road LLC in response to Ingles Markets, Incorporated's repeated misleading statements. The Company criticized Ingles for their dishonest attacks and questioned the judgment of the incumbent Board. Summer Road highlighted the importance of independent shareholder voices and expressed concern over Ingles' opposition to such voices. Ingles Markets, Incorporated (NASDAQ: IMKTA) was specifically targeted for their actions. The statement emphasized the need for transparency and integrity in shareholder communications.

data.title: Truist reports first quarter 2026 results
data.description: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 in Charlotte, North Carolina, on April 17. The earnings call for the quarter will be live at 8 a.m. ET today and accessible through a webcast link or dial-in option. Investors interested in this can access the call via the webcast link at app.webinar.net/7W4qlGD2wzg.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Announces Strategic Partnership with AGIBOT for AI Robotics
data.description: In Las Vegas on April 17, 2026, Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS), a leading artificial intelligence ("AI") data center firm centered around Bitcoin, disclosed that its subsidiary, Omnipresent Robotics, LLC, has achieved significant milestones.
